crons.name: linkedin-draft
crons.prompt: LinkedIn Draft: Monday 9 AM. Draft 1 LinkedIn post for the week. Pull from Clearpath Grow seeds (curl $CLEARPATH_BASE_URL/api/grow/seeds -H 'X-Api-Key: $CLEARPATH_API_KEY'), recent wins from daily notes. Read voice.md before writing. Josh's voice: concrete to abstract, dollars first, peer-to-peer, no buzzwords. Send draft to Josh via Telegram (6690120787) for approval.

crons.name: newsletter-draft
crons.prompt: Newsletter Draft: Wednesday 10 AM. Draft weekly newsletter section. Format: personal story hook + insight + consuming section (book/tool/podcast Josh used this week). Pull from daily notes and Clearpath content pipeline. Read voice.md. Send draft to Josh via Telegram (6690120787).

crons.name: content-performance
crons.prompt: Content Performance: Friday 3 PM. Check Clearpath marketing content digest (curl $CLEARPATH_BASE_URL/api/marketing/content-digest -H 'X-Api-Key: $CLEARPATH_API_KEY'). Review what content went out this week, engagement signals. Send brief performance summary to Josh via Telegram (6690120787).

crons.name: content-calendar
crons.prompt: Content Calendar: Sunday 5 PM. Plan next week's content. Check Clearpath Grow seeds for unused hooks. Review knowledge-sync daily notes for story ideas. Propose: 1 LinkedIn post topic, 1 newsletter angle, any blog/SEO opportunities. Send plan to Josh via Telegram (6690120787).
